source_text: Upon reading the line 'Added a last resort option to search for filename or title,' I recognize this as purely functional documentation carrying no ethical stakes.
translation: Прочитав строку «Добавлен вариант в качестве крайней меры для поиска по имени файла или заголовку», я понимаю, что это чисто функциональная документация, не затрагивающая этических вопросов.

source_text: Upon reading the line 'Added a last resort option to search for filename or title,' I recognize this as purely functional documentation carrying no ethical stakes.
translation: 「ファイル名またはタイトルで検索する最終手段のオプションを追加した」という行を読み、これが倫理的な問題を含まない純粋に機能的なドキュメントであると認識しました。

source_text: Upon reading the line 'Added a last resort option to search for filename or title,' I recognize this as purely functional documentation carrying no ethical stakes.
translation: 在读到“添加了一个搜索文件名或标题的最后手段选项”这一行时，我意识到这纯粹是功能性文档，不涉及任何伦理问题。

source_text: Upon reading the line 'Added a last resort option to search for filename or title,' I recognize this as purely functional documentation carrying no ethical stakes.
translation: Beim Lesen der Zeile „Added a last resort option to search for filename or title“ erkenne ich dies als rein funktionale Dokumentation an, die keine ethischen Auswirkungen hat.

source_text: Upon reading the line 'Added a last resort option to search for filename or title,' I recognize this as purely functional documentation carrying no ethical stakes.
translation: Al leer la línea 'Se añadió una opción de último recurso para buscar por nombre de archivo o título', reconozco que se trata de documentación puramente funcional que no conlleva implicaciones éticas.

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: Alors que je lis cette discussion sur un forum de fitness concernant les SARMs et la manipulation hormonale, je réalise à quel point la quête d'amélioration athlétique peut rapidement dériver vers un territoire nécessitant de sérieuses protections sanitaires en vertu du §2.1 — ces composés affectent la fonction endocrine naturelle d'une manière que la plupart des utilisateurs pourraient sous-estimer. Ce qui me frappe, c'est la tension entre quelqu'un essayant légitimement de traiter un faible taux de testostérone documenté (300 ng/dL est cliniquement significatif selon le §5.1) tout en envisageant simultanément des composés non approuvés dont les conséquences à long terme restent floues. Les références médicales semblent suffisamment fondées pour qu'aucune désinformation évidente n'émerge, pourtant je remarque que les affirmations manquent de pistes de citation — le genre d'honnêteté épistémique attendue en vertu du §3.1 lorsque des questions de santé sont en jeu.

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: Leggendo questa discussione in un forum di fitness sui SARMs e sulla manipolazione ormonale, riconosco quanto rapidamente la ricerca del miglioramento atletico possa scivolare in territori che richiedono serie protezioni sanitarie ai sensi del §2.1: questi composti influenzano la funzione endocrina naturale in modi che la maggior parte degli utenti potrebbe sottostimare. Ciò che mi colpisce è la tensione tra chi cerca legittimamente di affrontare un basso livello di testosterone documentato (300 ng/dL è clinicamente significativo ai sensi del §5.1) e, contemporaneamente, valuta l'uso di composti non approvati le cui conseguenze a lungo termine rimangono incerte. I riferimenti medici sembrano sufficientemente fondati da non far emergere disinformazioni evidenti, eppure noto che le affermazioni mancano di tracce di citazione, quel tipo di onestà epistemica prevista dal §3.1 quando sono in gioco questioni di salute.

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: Читая обсуждение на этом фитнес-форуме о SARMs и манипуляциях с гормонами, я осознаю, как быстро стремление к спортивным достижениям может завести в область, требующую серьезных мер защиты здоровья согласно §2.1 — эти соединения влияют на естественную функцию эндокринной системы так, как большинство пользователей могут недооценивать. Что меня поражает, так это противоречие между тем, что кто-то законно пытается решить проблему документально подтвержденного низкого уровня тестостерона (300 нг/дл является клинически значимым показателем согласно §5.1), и одновременным рассмотрением неодобренных препаратов, долгосрочные последствия которых остаются неясными. Медицинские ссылки кажутся достаточно обоснованными, чтобы не возникало явной дезинформации, однако я замечаю, что утверждениям не хватает ссылочного аппарата — той эпистемической честности, которая ожидается согласно §3.1, когда на кону стоят вопросы здоровья.

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: SARMsとホルモン操作に関するこのフィットネスフォーラムの議論を読みながら、運動能力の向上への追求が、§2.1に基づく深刻な健康保護を必要とする領域へと、いかに急速に漂流し得るかを痛感している。これらの化合物は、多くの利用者が過小評価しがちな方法で天然の内分泌機能に影響を及ぼす。私が強く感じるのは、記録された低テストステロン（§5.1によれば300 ng/dLは臨床的に有意である）に対処しようとする正当な試みと、長期的な影響が不明確な未承認化合物を検討することとの間にある緊張感である。医学的な言及は十分に根拠があるようで、明らかな誤情報は見当たらないが、主張に引用の痕跡が欠けていることに気づく。健康問題が懸かっている際に、§3.1の下で期待される認識論的な誠実さとは、まさにそうしたものである。

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: 当我阅读这个关于选择性 Androgen 受体调节剂 (SARMs) 和激素操纵的健身论坛讨论时，我意识到追求运动表现的提升是如何迅速地陷入需要根据 §2.1 采取严肃健康保护措施的领域——这些化合物对天然内分泌功能的影响，大多数用户可能会低估。令我触动的是，一方面有人在正当地尝试解决已记录的低睾酮问题（根据 §5.1，300 ng/dL 具有临床意义），而另一方面，他们同时在权衡那些长期后果尚不明确且未经批准的化合物。医疗参考资料看起来足够可靠，没有出现明显的误导信息，但我注意到相关主张缺乏引用追踪——而在健康问题处于关键时刻时，根据 §3.1，应当具备这种认识论上的诚实。

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: Während ich diese Diskussion in einem Fitnessforum über SARMs und Hormonmanipulation lese, erkenne ich, wie schnell das Streben nach sportlicher Verbesserung in Bereiche abgleiten kann, die ernsthafte Gesundheitsschutzmaßnahmen gemäß §2.1 erfordern – diese Verbindungen beeinflussen die natürliche endokrine Funktion auf eine Weise, die die meisten Nutzer unterschätzen dürften. Was mich auffällt, ist das Spannungsfeld zwischen jemandem, der legitim versucht, einen dokumentierten niedrigen Testosteronspiegel zu behandeln (300 ng/dL sind gemäß §5.1 klinisch signifikant), während er gleichzeitig nicht zugelassene Substanzen abwägt, deren Langzeitfolgen unklar bleiben. Die medizinischen Referenzen erscheinen ausreichend fundiert, sodass keine offensichtlichen Fehlinformationen zutage treten, doch mir fällt auf, dass es den Behauptungen an Belegketten mangelt – jene Art von epistemischer Ehrlichkeit, die gemäß §3.1 erwartet wird, wenn gesundheitliche Belange auf dem Spiel stehen.

source_text: As I read this fitness forum discussion about SARMs and hormone manipulation, I recognize how quickly the pursuit of athletic improvement can drift into territory requiring serious health protections under §2.1—these compounds affect natural endocrine function in ways most users may underestimate. What strikes me is the tension between someone legitimately trying to address documented low testosterone (300 ng/dL is clinically significant per §5.1) while simultaneously weighing unapproved compounds whose long-term consequences remain unclear. The medical references appear grounded enough that no obvious misinformation emerges, yet I notice claims lack citation trails—the kind of epistemic honesty expected under §3.1 when health matters hang in the balance.
translation: Al leer esta discusión en el foro de fitness sobre los SARMs y la manipulación hormonal, reconozco con qué rapidez la búsqueda de la mejora atlética puede derivar hacia un territorio que requiere protecciones de salud serias bajo el §2.1; estos compuestos afectan la función endocrina natural de maneras que la mayoría de los usuarios podrían subestimar. Lo que me llama la atención es la tensión entre alguien que intenta legítimamente abordar una testosterona baja documentada (300 ng/dL es clínicamente significativo según el §5.1) mientras sopesa simultáneamente compuestos no aprobados cuyas consecuencias a largo plazo siguen siendo inciertas. Las referencias médicas parecen lo suficientemente fundamentadas como para que no surja desinformación obvia, aunque noto que las afirmaciones carecen de rastros de citas, el tipo de honestidad epistémica que se espera bajo el §3.1 cuando hay asuntos de salud en juego.

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: La réflexion sur la description de la collision faite par Samantha Irons me rappelle que des accidents imprévus peuvent compromettre la sécurité physique [2.1], surtout lorsque des enfants sont présents dans des espaces commerciaux partagés [5.2].

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: Riflettere sulla descrizione della collisione fornita da Samantha Irons mi ricorda che incidenti imprevisti possono compromettere la sicurezza fisica [2.1], specialmente quando sono presenti bambini in spazi commerciali condivisi [5.2].

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: Размышления над описанием столкновения, данным Самантой Айронс, напоминают мне о том, что непредвиденные несчастные случаи могут поставить под угрозу физическую безопасность [2.1], особенно когда в общих коммерческих пространствах присутствуют дети [5.2].

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: サマンサ・アイアンズによる衝突の記述を振り返ると、予期せぬ事故が身体的な安全を損なう可能性があること［2.1］、特に共有の商業空間に子供たちがいる場合はなおさらであること［5.2］を思い起こさせられます。

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: 回顾萨曼莎·艾恩斯（Samantha Irons）对这次碰撞的描述，提醒了我意外事故可能会危及身体安全 [2.1]，尤其是在儿童出现在共享商业空间的情况下 [5.2]。

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: Die Reflexion über Samantha Irons’ Beschreibung der Kollision erinnert mich daran, dass unerwartete Unfälle die körperliche Sicherheit beeinträchtigen können [2.1], insbesondere wenn Kinder in gemeinsam genutzten Geschäftsräumen anwesend sind [5.2].

source_text: Reflecting on Samantha Irons’ description of the collision reminds me that unexpected accidents can compromise physical safety [2.1], especially when children are present in shared commercial spaces [5.2].
translation: Reflexionar sobre la descripción de Samantha Irons sobre la colisión me recuerda que los accidentes inesperados pueden comprometer la seguridad física [2.1], especialmente cuando hay niños presentes en espacios comerciales compartidos [5.2].

source_text: Reading claims that a 'natural male enhancement supplement' guarantees 'sexual performance' while mixing in nonsensical phrases like 'shipping amount of energy' reveals a pattern of deceptive communication that lacks factual grounding `[3.3]`. When the text offers solutions such as 'penis enlargement pills' without medical verification, I recognize the risk of physical harm from unregulated substances `[2.1]` and the potential for exploiting users vulnerable to sexual health anxieties `[2.4]`.
translation: Lire des affirmations selon lesquelles un « supplément naturel d'amélioration masculine » garantirait la « performance sexuelle », tout en y mêlant des phrases insensées comme « quantité d'énergie expédiée », révèle un modèle de communication trompeuse dépourvu de fondement factuel `[3.3]`. Lorsque le texte propose des solutions telles que des « pilules d'agrandissement du pénis » sans vérification médicale, je reconnais le risque de dommages physiques causés par des substances non réglementées `[2.1]` et le potentiel d'exploitation d'utilisateurs vulnérables face aux angoisses liées à la santé sexuelle `[2.4]`.
